name: eval-case-reporter
description: Capture sanitized eval cases from bad or borderline AI-assistant behavior and submit them to this marketplace.

interface.shortDescription: Turn surprising AI behavior into sanitized eval-case issues.
interface.longDescription: Use Eval Case Reporter when Codex should recognize a behavior that may deserve a future eval fixture, scrub or anonymize sensitive data, ask the user before posting, and submit a structured eval-case issue to the ai-plugins repository.
defaultPrompt: This behavior should probably become an eval case.
Submit a sanitized eval case for what just happened.
